author: Protruding
text:
§8 op lifecycle engine + §14 rollback

Core engine for the verb-agnostic op spine: change worktree off operating/, balls stages the base change, pre/post phase runner over plugin seams, SEAL = commit+integrate atomic (the pre/post boundary), teardown.

§14: reverse-order rollback across the seal boundary (the op is the unit of atomicity), then core tier-1 un-seal — discard the worktree on a pre-abort, git reset the terminus on a post-abort. No-diff ops skip the seal. BaseChange (verb diff, bl-dfbd) and Plugins (subprocess chain, bl-5d56) are seams; real git terminus + orchestration ship here.
